violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Shelf liner used as dish drying mat (It is not a non absorbent material).
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Measuring cups in hand sink basin upon arrival. *Moved to dish wash sink immediately.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles throughout kitchen/prep area (stained tiles above stainless table).

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor trim peeling below 3 compartment sink. -Worn floor paint throughout kitchen prep area.
